findings.title: Placeholder used as only label
findings.group_reason: Rule is classified as safe to patch automatically for this evidence source.

mapping.explanation: Mapped directly from the source scanner location.

proposed_fix.diff:
```diff
- <input type='email' name='contact_email' placeholder='Email'>
+ <label for="contact-email-6">Email</label>
+ <input id="contact-email-6" type='email' name='contact_email' placeholder='Email'>
```

not_checked.title: Audio-only and Video-only (Prerecorded)
not_checked.notes: Media asset review required.

not_checked.title: Captions (Prerecorded)
not_checked.notes: Media asset review required.

not_checked.title: Audio Description or Media Alternative (Prerecorded)
not_checked.notes: Media asset review required.

not_checked.title: Captions (Live)
not_checked.notes: Live media review required.

not_checked.title: Audio Description (Prerecorded)
not_checked.notes: Media asset review required.

not_checked.title: Meaningful Sequence
not_checked.notes: The checklist exercises tab order (2.4.3); programmatic reading-sequence review is not automated.

not_checked.title: Sensory Characteristics
not_checked.notes: Non-color sensory cues (shape, size, orientation, sound) are not exercised by the checklist.

not_checked.title: Orientation
not_checked.notes: Portrait/landscape lock review not automated; 1.4.10 reflow is separate.

not_checked.title: Identify Input Purpose
not_checked.notes: No autocomplete rule is implemented; user must review `autocomplete` attributes on personal-data fields.

not_checked.title: Images of Text
not_checked.notes: Image-of-text detection is not automated; the checklist doesn't exercise it.

not_checked.title: Content on Hover or Focus
not_checked.notes: Hoverable/focusable revealed content (tooltips, popovers) is not exercised by the checklist.

not_checked.title: Character Key Shortcuts
not_checked.notes: Single-character shortcuts are not audited automatically.

not_checked.title: Timing Adjustable
not_checked.notes: Session-timeout review required.

not_checked.title: Pause, Stop, Hide
not_checked.notes: Auto-updating content review required.

not_checked.title: Three Flashes or Below Threshold
not_checked.notes: Flashing/seizure review requires a visual frame-rate pass the scanner cannot perform.

not_checked.title: Multiple Ways
not_checked.notes: Multi-path navigation (search, sitemap, nav) review is not automated and the checklist doesn't exercise it.

not_checked.title: Pointer Gestures
not_checked.notes: Multi-point / path-based gestures (pinch, rotate, swipe paths) are not exercised by the checklist; 2.5.7 dragging is covered separately.

not_checked.title: Pointer Cancellation
not_checked.notes: Down-event / up-event behavior is not audited automatically.

not_checked.title: Motion Actuation
not_checked.notes: Device-motion / user-motion triggers are not audited automatically.

not_checked.title: Language of Parts
not_checked.notes: Inline `lang` attributes on foreign-language passages are not audited automatically.

not_checked.title: On Focus
not_checked.notes: Context-change-on-focus review is not automated.

not_checked.title: On Input
not_checked.notes: Context-change-on-input review is not automated.

not_checked.title: Consistent Navigation
not_checked.notes: Cross-page consistency review is not in scope for a single audit run.

not_checked.title: Consistent Identification
not_checked.notes: Cross-page consistent labeling review is not in scope for a single audit run.

not_checked.title: Consistent Help
not_checked.notes: Cross-page consistent-help-location review is not in scope for a single audit run.

not_checked.title: Error Suggestion
not_checked.notes: Correction-suggestion review is not in scope; the checklist only confirms errors are announced.

not_checked.title: Error Prevention (Legal, Financial, Data)
not_checked.notes: Destructive-action confirmation review is not automated.

not_checked.title: Redundant Entry
not_checked.notes: Multi-step flow review required.

not_checked.title: Accessible Authentication (Minimum)
not_checked.notes: Auth flow review required.
